rationale: Improvement to add Pipeline support to findAndModify; API ergonomics, no spec rule violated.
Fix PHP 8.5 language deprecations; build/language compatibility issue, no spec involvement.
Add API to detect Atlas Search support; ergonomics feature request, not a spec conformance issue.
Configure GitHub Copilot code review instructions; CI tooling, no spec involvement.
Add PHP 8.5 to Evergreen CI matrix; CI configuration, not spec test infrastructure.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3397, Improvement type; proactive spec rollout for new requirement, not a bug.
Deadlock in Cursor destructor during GC in PyPy; concurrency/memory bug, no spec rule violated.
Deprecate obsolete Database.error() methods; API cleanup, no spec conformance issue.
Unify driver client classes into MongoClient; internal API refactor, not a spec violation.
Make BaseObject immutable in PyMongo 3; API design change, no spec rule violated.
Simplify connection pool internals after removing start_request; internal refactor, no spec involvement.
Port BSON module to single-source Python 2/3 code; internal porting work, no spec involvement.
Port pymongo module to single-source Python 2/3 code; internal porting work, no spec involvement.
Port test module to single-source Python 2/3 code; internal porting work, no spec involvement.
Port gridfs module to single-source Python 2/3 code; internal porting work, no spec involvement.
PyMongo returns naive datetimes by design; user confusion, no spec rule requires timezone-aware datetime output.
add_user() ignores configured write concern on Database/MongoClient; spec requires commands to respect write concern.
Improvement to implement upcoming auth spec requirement; proactive spec rollout, driver not yet wrong.
Rename uuid_subtype to uuid_representation; API ergonomics, mentions Java/.NET only for historical context.
Fix documentation method signature formatting; docs improvement, no spec involvement.
Update generated documentation style to Python 3 format; docs change, no spec involvement.
Remove previously deprecated API methods and options; cleanup, no spec conformance issue.
Nearest-server selection doesn't prefer localhost mongos on low-latency network; performance/optimization, no specific spec rule violated.
Clarify which layer translates socket.error to ConnectionFailure; internal refactor, no spec rule involved.
Improvement to change MIN_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL per DRIVERS-209; proactive spec alignment, not a bug.
Driver omits required $readPreference field in secondary-ok commands to mongos; explicit spec requirement violated.
Secondary reads fail against mongos in sharded topology; references SPEC-176, driver mishandles read preference routing.
Race condition in max wire version state with mixed-version mongos; implementation concurrency bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
current_op and unlock not enforcing primary read preference; legacy namespace query, no spec-defined rule found.
Reference leaks in C extension error paths found by Coverity; memory management bug, no spec involvement.
find() mutates defaultdict filter by adding _id key; Python-specific implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Change ssl=True default to require certificate verification; security improvement, not a spec nonconformance.
PeriodicExecutor deadlocks and threading issues in PyPy; runtime/concurrency bug, no spec involvement.
Use certifi/wincertstore for CA certificates on older Python versions; TLS implementation detail, no spec rule violated.
Third-party mongokit library broken by PyMongo 3 removal of MasterSlaveConnection; compatibility issue, no spec involvement.
Collection.save() no longer returns _id in PyMongo 3; legacy API behavior change, no spec rule violated.
Cursor.hint() with index spec raises TypeError; regression in type validation logic, no spec rule involved.
Add docstring example for 'modifiers' in find(); documentation gap, no spec conformance issue.
json_util fails to parse valid RFC-3339 $date strings like '2015-03-18T20:30:50.508Z'; Extended JSON spec requires this format.
ssl_cert_reqs URI option rejects string values; Python-specific SSL option parsing bug, no cross-driver spec rule involved.
CommandCursor calls wrong internal wrapping function; implementation bug with no spec rule contradicted.
AssertionError in CommandCursor getMore on MongoDB 2.4; internal cursor state tracking bug, no specific spec rule identified.
ConfigurationError for removed option auto_start_request; PyMongo 3 API breakage, no spec involvement.
getMore sent to wrong mongos after cursor created on different mongos; cursor pinning spec requirement violated.
GridFS.delete uses delete_one on chunks instead of delete_many; spec requires removing all chunks for a file.
cursor.alive stays True when cursorId=0; spec defines cursor exhaustion; driver fails to set alive=False on closed cursor.
SONManipulator not applied to update $set with custom types; Python-specific ORM layer bug, no spec rule violated.
find_one with PRIMARY_PREFERRED returns no results via mongos; $readPreference not sent correctly, same class as PYTHON-865.
PyPI package missing documentation source files; packaging/docs issue, no spec involvement.
Document serverSelectionTimeoutMS and clarify connectTimeoutMS behavior; documentation bug, no spec rule violated.
